Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Refund

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Refund
public class Refund extends SObject

Java class for Refund complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Refund">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Amount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Balance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationEffectiveDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationGatewayDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationGatewayRefNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationGatewayResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationSfResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClientContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Comments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Date" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationFinanceTransactions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EffectiveDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceBalanceSnapshots" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FinanceTransactions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayRefNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GatewayResultCodeDescription" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImpactAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IpAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MacAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NetApplied" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentFinanceTransactions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGateway" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PaymentGateway" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGatewayId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGatewayLogs" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGroup" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PaymentGroup" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGroupId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethod" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PaymentMethod" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessExceptions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessingMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RefundLinePayments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RefundNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SfResultCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceFinanceTransactions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalApplied" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalUnapplied" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
